channel.title: Surveillance Radar on Wuhan Cyrentis Technology Co., Ltd.
channel.description: Recent content in Surveillance Radar on Wuhan Cyrentis Technology Co., Ltd.

item.title: SRC-C03A-1G
item.description: SRC-C03A-1G Surveillance Radar is positioned for land border surveillance, critical site protection, and perimeter monitoring projects where operators need C band Pulse Doppler sensing and a readable site-warning layer. The electronic azimuth scanning architecture supports structured deployment planning and downstream response coordination.

item.title: SRC-K01B-2D
item.description: SRC-K01B-2D Surveillance Radar is positioned for border surveillance, maritime surveillance, and key site protection projects where operators need Ku band FMCW sensing and a readable site-warning layer. The mechanical azimuth scanning + electronic elevation steering architecture supports structured deployment planning and downstream response coordination.

item.title: SRC-K02E-2G
item.description: SRC-K02E-2G moving target surveillance radar is positioned for land border surveillance, maritime surveillance, and critical site protection projects where operators need Ku band FMCW sensing and a readable site-warning layer. The four-face aesa array architecture supports structured deployment planning and downstream response coordination.

item.title: SRC-K03B-2D
item.description: SRC-K03B-2D Surveillance Radar is positioned for border surveillance, maritime surveillance, and critical site protection projects where operators need Ku band FMCW sensing and a readable site-warning layer. The mechanical azimuth scanning + electronic elevation steering architecture supports structured deployment planning and downstream response coordination.

item.title: SRC-K04A-2G
item.description: SRC-K04A-2G Surveillance Radar is positioned for land border surveillance, maritime surveillance, and critical site protection projects where operators need Ku band FMCW sensing and a readable site-warning layer. The electronic azimuth scanning architecture supports structured deployment planning and downstream response coordination.

item.title: SRC-K05C-1D
item.description: SRC-K05C-1D Surveillance Radar is positioned for low-altitude surveillance, critical site protection, and counter-uas early warning projects where operators need Ku band Pulse Doppler sensing and a readable site-warning layer. The 2d electronic scanning (single-face aesa) architecture supports structured deployment planning and downstream response coordination.

item.title: SRC-K05D-1D
item.description: SRC-K05D-1D Surveillance Radar is positioned for low-altitude surveillance, critical site protection, and counter-uas early warning projects where operators need Ku band Pulse Doppler sensing and a readable site-warning layer. The electronic scanning with mechanical rotation architecture supports structured deployment planning and downstream response coordination.

item.title: SRC-K05E-1D
item.description: SRC-K05E-1D Surveillance Radar is positioned for low-altitude surveillance, critical site protection, and counter-uas early warning projects where operators need Ku band Pulse Doppler sensing and a readable site-warning layer. The four-face aesa array architecture supports structured deployment planning and downstream response coordination.

item.title: SRC-X01C-1D
item.description: SRC-X01C-1D Surveillance Radar is positioned for low-altitude surveillance, critical site protection, and counter-uas early warning projects where operators need X band Pulse Doppler sensing and a readable site-warning layer. The 2d electronic scanning (single-face aesa) architecture supports structured deployment planning and downstream response coordination.

The electronic scanning with mechanical rotation architecture supports structured deployment planning and downstream response coordination.
